creator: patovm04@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #6)
Hi, I just gave iwlwifi a try on 14.0-BETA5 and it was again as fast as it's been (considering 802.11a). So the 'drop in performance' is no more...
Gonna try and keep using it for a while so I can test how stable it is as of now.
Thank you for your ongoing work!
